channel.title: Hey Genyl Blog
channel.description: Freelance SEO specialist, local SEO, and WordPress SEO expert helping local businesses rank higher, drive more traffic, and attract qualified leads. Let's talk.

item.title: Why SEO Is Important for Business (And What It Costs You)
item.description: Wondering why SEO is important for business? Your competitors are already ranking. Learn what it costs you and how to fix it. Get your free SEO audit today.

item.title: How Often Should You Conduct an SEO Audit
item.description: Learn how often to run an SEO audit based on your site type, triggers, and goals. Stop guessing and start auditing with a plan.

item.title: Why Duplicate Content Is an SEO Issue
item.description: Duplicate content is one of the most overlooked SEO issues. It splits authority and confuses Google. Learn why it matters and book your free SEO audit today.

item.title: How to Create Content for Local Landing Pages for SEO
item.description: Most local landing pages exist but never rank. Learn how to create content for local landing pages for SEO that actually drives traffic. Book your free SEO audit today.
